message:
🐛 fix: remove deprecated gh-copilot from AI agent dropdown (#8145) (#8147)

The gh-copilot CLI extension is deprecated — when selected it returns
"deprecated, no commands will be executed" instead of doing any work.

Remove the provider, its tests, and all lingering references to the
"gh-copilot" agent name:

- pkg/agent/provider_ghcopilot.go (+ test) deleted
- registry.go: drop suggest-only map entry and stale deprecation note
- server_ai.go: drop gh-copilot from suggestOnlyAgents fallback list
- useMissions.tsx: drop gh-copilot from INTERACTIVE_AGENTS set
- AgentStatusIndicator.tsx: drop gh-copilot from nameToProvider map
- useMissions.test.tsx: drop the now-irrelevant gh-copilot fixture row

Fixes #8145

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
